title: Grilled Castelvetrano Olives with Arabian Pilaf
description: A unique Japanese-inspired dish combining the sweetness of Castelvetrano olives with the savory flavors of Arabian pilaf and a hint of Saudi spices.
instructions: Grill Castelvetrano olives for 2-3 minutes per side.
In a separate pan, heat grapeseed oil over low heat.
Add Arabian rice and saffron threads to the pan. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add Saudi cinnamon powder and pilaf seasoning to the rice mixture. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and set aside.
Serve grilled olives over the Arabian pilaf.
